raw: BENEFITS Library Passes are $10 per ticket (discounted from the regular fee of $20 per ticket). One library pass will be valid for up to two admission tickets at the discounted price. Current pricing and visitor information: https://www.icaboston.org/visit Patrons under the age of 18 are free without the pass.

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Patrons under the age of 18 are free without the pass
